positive: Minimalist abstract line art illustration featuring a single geometric mountain range composed of interlocking pastel shapes (peach, mint, lavender). The style should evoke Japanese Sumi-e painting mixed with modern Scandinavian design. Clean white background, single continuous line work, highly scalable vector feel, elegant composition.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, excessive color, clutter, photorealistic, shading
